text.title: Elicitation Techniques Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the elicitation-techniques methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: Discovery week → interview S.Operator (ES-0014) + observation shadow (ES-0017) → REQ stub BR-0019 cites both → committed to repo, glossary updated, hand-off to requirements-documentation.

section.title: Resulting artefact
